package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.agents; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.util.EvolutionConstants; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.tools.ToolFactory; public class FileAgent extends BaseAiAgent { public FileAgent() { super(EvolutionConstants.AGENT_FILE, EvolutionConstants.AGENT_FILE); addTool(ToolFactory.getTool(EvolutionConstants.TOOL_FILE)); } @Override protected String getAgentInstructions() { return "You are an AI File Agent. Your primary task is to manage files and directories.
" + "Use the FileTool to read, write, or delete files as requested."; } }
